Chelsea transfer news: Victor Osimhen January hope as 'secret clause' revealed
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly given hope of signing Napoli striker Victor Osimhen in January due to a break clause in his contract with loan club Galatasaray.

arts.ttl: Serie A: Cagliari vs Napoli – probable line-ups
arts.sum: Romelu Lukaku is in line to make his full Serie A debut when Antonio Conte’s...

arts.ttl: Cagliari and Napoli in search of three points
arts.sum: Napoli have won six of their last eight away games against Cagliari in Serie A – scoring an average of 2.6 goals per game in the process – although the two most recent games ended in draws. Cagliari have won only one of their last 26 games against Napoli in Serie A (D8 L17) - 1-0 away in September 2019, with Rolando Maran in charge and the goal from Lucas Castro.

arts.ttl: Napoli Manager Heaps Praise on Two Midfield Signings
arts.sum: Napoli return to their Serie A duties after the international break as they head to the Unipol Domus to meet Cagliari on Sunday evening. Antonio Conte spoke to the press in the build-up to the game, discussing several topics, including late summer signings Billy Gilmour and Scott McTominay. The post Napoli Manager Heaps Praise on Two Midfield Signings appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Napoli Loanee Enjoys Winning Start to Super Lig Career
arts.sum: Napoli loanee Victor Osimhen enjoyed a triumphant start to his season-long loan at Galatasaray on Saturday evening. The reigning Turkish Super Lig holders brushed Rizespor aside with an overwhelming 5-0 victory on home turf. The post Napoli Loanee Enjoys Winning Start to Super Lig Career appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Better than Osimhen? Nigeria star Boniface is football's next €100m striker
arts.sum: Boniface would finish the game with two goals and an assist to his name as Leverkusen strolled to a 4-1 win. Victor Boniface reannounced himself to the Bundesliga against Hoffenheim on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Cagliari v Napoli: Match Preview
arts.sum: Napoli travel to Sardinia on Sunday evening to face Cagliari as Serie A action resumes after the international break. The visitors will be looking to build on their dramatic victory before the pause, while the hosts are still searching for their first win of the season. Antonio Conte’s Napoli side staged a remarkable comeback in their last outing, scoring twice in stoppage time to defeat Parma 2-1. New signing Romelu Lukaku opened his account for the club with the equalizer before Frank Anguissa headed home the winner. The victory helped erase memories of their opening day loss to Hellas Verona The post Serie A | Cagliari v Napoli: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A Preview: Cagliari vs Napoli – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Last season's Serie A relegation fighters, Cagliari, entertain redemption hopefuls Napoli at the Unipol Domus on Sunday evening. Both teams headed into September's international break with mixed feelings and will hope to resume on a positive note. The post Serie A Preview: Cagliari vs Napoli – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's reason for Victor Osimhen rejection 'revealed' amid £63.4m hope
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly vetoed a move for Napoli striker Victor Osimhen in the summer transfer window after learning that it would take £109m to prise him away from Italy.
